reply.text: How flexible are you when it comes to terrible decisions like me

messages.text: flexible, boy i can barely trust sidewalks?
those heels said you signed the waiver already
the heels did, my brain clocked out
my brain clocked out when i saw that dress
brain been unemployed since you opened this dm 😂
fair, but i still applied for the position
benefits include chaos, delusion and sore ankles
you talk big, can you back it
store credit, no receipt, lifetime warranty on nonsense
sounds like a scam run from a trench coat
i showed my friends before i even replied
if i fall its on your terrible decisions package
ill absolutely sue the sidewalk for emotional damage
judge will see the dress and side with me
